title: Kena Upanishad I: By Whom?
description: From the Kena Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Kena Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: By whom impelled does the mind go forth? By whom directed does the breath move? By whom is speech spoken? Who is the god behind the eye and the ear? It is the ear of the ear, the eye of the eye, the mind of the mind, the speech of speech, and the life of the life.
